Doctor & Director of Yonsei Saebom Clinic Yong-Hyun CHAE (Dr. Chae)
187 MEDICAL CONSULTING
YONG-HYUN CHAE (DR. CHAE) DOCTOR & DIRECTOR OF YONSEI SAEBOM CLINIC.
Did you know that there are times when children can grow up ?
Treatment timing and duration vary depending on the child's growth pattern, target height, and secondary sexual sign progression. But if it's too late, it won't be big even if you get growth therapy. Therefore, it is recommended that the inspection be conducted in a timely manner. The test is separate from the treatment, so you don't have to bear much burden.

Name of the Hospital
Yonsei Saebom Medical Clinic

5 187 MEDICAL CONSULTING
INTRODUCTION TO DR. CHAE
Dr. Yong-Hyun Chae
2002
Graduated from Yonsei University College of Medicine Graduated from Yonsei University College of Medicine Graduate School Completed internship and residency at Gangnam Severance Hospital Awarded Outstanding Paper by a Society in 2008
2010
Former Public Relations Doctor for Yongin City IFBB Pro, USPTA Level II Personal Trainer In charge Doctor of improving athletic performance for SSG Landers baseball team Former team doctor for Nexen Heroes baseball team Former Medical Advisor for NABBA/WFF Founded Yonsei Saebom Medical Clinic in South Korea
2023
Founded the Thailand branch of Yonsei Saebom Medical Clinic
2025
Current Director of Yonsei Saebom Medical Clinic – Specialized in Hormone Treatment
• Multiple Columns Published in Golf Magazine (Golf for Woman), InStyle, Vogue, JoongAng Daily Invited speaker for Hana Bank Gangnam Branch Private Banking - Topic: Hormones and Aging • Invited speaker at Seongdong District Welfare Center - Topic: Hormones and Healthy Aging, Secrets of Healthy 100-year Life Lecture for Incheon Songlim Elementary School Basketball Team - Athlete Growth Clinic • Lecture for Seoul Bangbae Elementary School Baseball Team - Athlete Growth Clinic • Appearances on Altoraan TV - Episodes 5 [7 Hidden Truths Hospitals are Hiding 1] - 6 [7 Hidden Truths Hospitals are Hiding 2] • Appearances on Golden Egg - Episode 172 [The Reversal of Carbohydrates and Fats] • Appearances on Manmul Sang - Episode 118 [Your Fate-Changing Practical Exercise] • Appearances on Live Information - Episode 1607 [Smart Health Rules] • Appearances on Morning Wide - Episode 6399 [Is it due to severe fatigue?] • Appearances on Live Today Morning - Episode 2708 [Utilizing Carbonated Water! - Immune Clinic] • Youtube - @187growup & @yonseisaebom

I am
committed to the health and well-being of our customers.
Dr. Yong-Hyun Chae
7
WHY
Why height growth program is mission
critical
?
187 MEDICAL CONSULTING 8
Appropriate height growth is a confirmation of child's healthy development.
According to Fortune 500, the average height of Fortune 500 company CEO is 6 ft 0 in (183cm) which is approximately 2.5 inches (6.4cm) taller than the average American man.
Fortune 500
Malcolm Gladwell, bestselling author and speaker says “Most of us, in ways that we are not entirely aware of, automatically associate leadership ability with imposing physical stature” which he also calls it some kind of “unconscious prejudice.
Malcolm Gladwell
Height growth treatment is one of the ways to offer more opportunities to children.
9 187 MEDICAL CONSULTING
WHY
Who needs height growth treatment ?
187 MEDICAL CONSULTING 10
Your child’s height growth is less than 4cm (or 1.6 inch) in one year. Your child is amongst the ten shortest boy or girl in his or her class.
Your child’s growth has slowed or suddenly stopped. Your child’s height is more than 10cm (or 4 inch) shorter than average.
normal value
test results
growth hormone level graph
Children who aspires to become an athlete, super model or an entertainer. Your child has abnormalities in his or her growth hormone level.
11 187 MEDICAL CONSULTING
PROCESS
What is the treatment process ?
187 MEDICAL CONSULTING 12
In Global
Test & Zoom consultation
01 02 03
Filling out a Bone age and full-body X-ray Measurement of height, weight, questionnaire. examination. and body composition analysis.
In Korea
More tests & treatment
04 05 06
Additional tests : Blood and urine Prescription : Individual hormone Monthly online consulting : Measurement
tests(mandatory tests), Heavy balance, tailored nutrition, of height, weight, and body composition metals, hair mineral, precocious exercise, and posture correction Hormone, tailored exercise, posture puberty(additional tests). management. correction, and nutritional prescription.
In Global
Continue to monitor and consultation every one month
07
I promise you healthy and balanced growth.
Regular check-ups at 6-month
Continuous management for 6 months to a year after treatment completion

15 187 MEDICAL CONSULTING
SIDE EFFECTS
What are side effects ?
187 MEDICAL CONSULTING 16
of administering growth hormones to patients have
while using growth hormones which naturally disappear over time.
dissipates over time), swelling (naturally subsides), hypothyroidism (extremely rare), and headache due to increased intracranial pressure (symptoms disappear immediately upon discontinuing the treatment).
We monitor side effects via ongoing regular check ups
17 187 MEDICAL CONSULTING
Q&A
Frequently Asked Questions
Q A
1. When is the right time to start?
For pediatric growth therapy, the timing of treatment has the greatest impact on the outcome. In general, 8 to 12 years old for girls and 9 to 13 years old for boys is the best
individual. You can check whether it can be treated and the
swelling, headache, etc.) that appear in the early stages, but usually can be resolved after a brief period of treatment break. Repeat the test every 6 months to check for side
even in adulthood.
3. How much does it cost?
Treatment costs will be paid on a yearly basis. It usually takes two to three years of treatment. Costs include management of growth hormones, management of adolescent progression, sleep management, growth nutrition management, and coaching corrective exercises.
187 MEDICAL CONSULTING 18
Q A
4. How tall will my child grow after the treatment?
duration of treatment. On average, if treated for about
depending on genetic characteristics, gender, lifestyle, and precocious puberty.
5. How do you assess the success of treatment?
Every six months, X-rays are used to determine how much older your child is than the average child (untreated children).
6. How long does the treatment take?
I need a few years of therapy. Usually, two to three years of treatment will bring you close to your target height. However, this varies slightly depending on the timing of treatment, gender, development stage of puberty, bone age, etc.
7. What treatments are required?
Manage all growth related matters.
growth hormone Management of Adolescent Progress Sleep Height Growth Nutrition Management Height growth exercise, body axis correction exercise
